why: Real English word (to hit; a dance), correctly spelled by sound /bɒp/ — the Read Lexicon just omits informal words. Lesson 1 teaches only 𐑐 𐑚 𐑪, so pop/bob/bop are the only real words it can build.
The -ed suffix, quoted in the body of lesson 37 while teaching it. An affix, not a word, so the lexicon has no entry.
